title: Add unit test for TaskVerifier metacharacter guard
description: Create a unit test file at test/unit/ledger/TaskVerifier.guard.test.ts that tests the assertAllowedCommand() guard in TaskVerifier. Test cases: (1) allowed commands pass (pnpm test, pnpm build, npx vitest), (2) commands with shell metacharacters are blocked (e.g. 'pnpm test; rm -rf /', 'pnpm test && echo pwned'), (3) disallowed prefixes are blocked (e.g. 'npm test', 'bash script.sh'). Use vi.hoisted() for any mock factories. Assert specific error messages, not just 'throws'.
scoringCriteria: Tests assert specific error message substrings
Covers all 3 categories: allowed, metachar blocked, prefix blocked

title: Add unit test for TaskRunner.buildPrompt
description: Create a unit test file at test/unit/ledger/TaskRunner.prompt.test.ts that tests TaskRunner.buildPrompt(). This is a private method, so test via runTask by mocking RalphLoop.run. Verify the prompt includes: task title, description, ALLOWED/FORBIDDEN files section, and verify command. Use vi.hoisted() for mock factories. Assert exact substring matches in the generated prompt.

title: Wire ledger status subcommand to show attempt/candidate counts
description: Enhance the 'status' CLI subcommand in src/ledger/cli.ts to also show per-task attempt counts and candidate counts alongside the existing summary. Add a --verbose flag that lists each task with its attempt count and latest candidate score. This wires the existing TaskLedger.loadAttempts() and loadCandidates() into the CLI output.

title: Improve TaskVerifier to record stdout/stderr from verify command
description: Enhance TaskVerifier.verify() in src/ledger/TaskVerifier.ts to capture stdout and stderr from the execFileSync call and store them in the TaskCandidate. Add stdout and stderr optional fields to TaskCandidate in types.ts. This improves harness transparency by preserving test output as evidence alongside the pass/fail boolean.
scoringCriteria: TaskVerifier captures both on success and failure

title: Add CLI integration test for load and list subcommands
description: Create an integration test at test/integration/ledger-cli.test.ts that tests the full lifecycle: (1) load a task from JSON, (2) list tasks to verify it appears, (3) show task details, (4) accept a candidate, (5) verify status reflects the decision. Use real LiminalFS (tmpdir), real TaskLedger, and the actual parseArgs+execute functions. This tests the CLI dispatch end-to-end without mocking internals.
scoringCriteria: Tests load, list, show, accept, status subcommands
Asserts specific values, not just defined
